gates.title: At-rest cryptography validation
automated_checks: Validate approved at-rest algorithm policy definition
Validate key-separation requirement exists

gates.title: In-transit cryptography validation
automated_checks: Validate TLS 1.3-only transport profile
Validate PFS requirement is defined

gates.title: Key lifecycle governance
automated_checks: Validate key lifecycle phases are documented
Validate revocation and destruction policies are present

gates.title: Boundary isolation enforcement
automated_checks: Validate SIPR/NIPR/offline boundaries are declared
Validate boundary transition audit requirements exist

gates.title: Data classification enforcement
automated_checks: Validate data class handling matrix exists
Validate per-class destruction policy exists

gates.title: Incident response policy enforcement
automated_checks: Validate incident trigger-to-action matrix exists
Validate escalation requirements are defined

gates.title: Immutable audit evidence enforcement
automated_checks: Validate immutable audit requirement exists
Validate signed UTC timestamp policy exists

gates.title: Classified destruction policy enforcement
automated_checks: Validate sanitization and cryptographic erasure controls exist
Validate destruction evidence outputs are defined

gates.title: Device trust attestation enforcement
automated_checks: Validate device attestation requirement exists
Validate government-managed endpoint requirement exists

gates.title: Offline operation security enforcement
automated_checks: Validate explicit offline indicator requirement exists
Validate signed local audit buffering requirement exists
